name: MF-094 USP30 inhibition mitochondrial disease cybrid study
summary: An in vitro study testing whether the USP30 inhibitor MF-094 can induce mitophagy and reduce mutant mtDNA load in cybrid cells carrying the m.8993T>G mutation.
model_system: 143B cybrid cells harboring 40% or 80% mutant m.8993T>G mtDNA associated with NARP syndrome and maternally inherited Leigh syndrome
